name: Silo Pharma, Inc.
business: Silo Pharma is a developmental stage biopharmaceutical and cryptocurrency company developing novel therapeutics for underserved conditions including PTSD, stress-induced anxiety disorders, fibromyalgia, and central nervous system diseases. The company also holds and stakes digital assets such as Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana as part of a cryptocurrency treasury strategy.

exposures.sentence: Our therapeutics focus is on developing novel therapeutics that address underserved conditions including PTSD, stress-induced anxiety disorders, fibromyalgia, and central nervous system (CNS) diseases.
Our strategy changed to include cryptocurrency treasury strategy in August 2025 to focus on the acquisition of leading digital assets.

catalysts.sentence: Currently, we are conducting GLP-compliant pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic studies and in early March 2025 we completed first dosing in an IND-enabling GLP-compliant toxicology and toxicokinetics, and we are aiming for an IND submission in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expiration of option agreement with UMB for SPU-16
catalysts.sentence: The July 2025 Termination and Option Agreement was effective as of July 8, 2025, and will expire on March 31, 2026, unless earlier terminated or superseded by a new definitive license agreement upon exercise of the Option.

On February 20, 2026, the Company's Board of Directors approved a stock repurchase program authorizing the purchase of up to $1 million of the Company's issued and outstanding common stock, from time to time, with such plan to be in place until December 31, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Global Alzheimer's therapeutics market projected to exceed $30.8 billion by 2033
tamClaims.sentence: Given the global Alzheimer's therapeutics market is projected to exceed $30.8 billion by 2033, SPC-14 presents a promising opportunity.

tamClaims.claim: Fibromyalgia affects approximately 4 million U.S. adults (2% of the population)
tamClaims.sentence: Fibromyalgia affects approximately 4 million U.S. adults (2% of the population).
